name: Ranchero Sauce- Melinda Lee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, sauté the chopped onion and garlic over medium heat.
Cook until soft, ensuring it does not brown.
2. Add the chopped bell pepper and cook until it is just tender but still crunchy.
3. Remove the tomatoes from their can and tear them into pieces. Add these to the skillet.
4. Incorporate the liquid from the tomatoes along with an equal amount of chicken broth.
Simmer the mixture for 30 to 45 minutes, or until it reaches your desired consistency.
5. The sauce will yield about 2-1/2 cups.
